name: Origin Protocol

supply.notes: Total supply inflated above 1B max in early years but effective circulating capped at 660M. Most team/advisor vesting complete (4-year schedules). Foundation & Ecosystem allocations releasing through 2025-2026 but kept out of circulation.

market.notes: Market cap: ~$15.8M (660M × $0.0234). FDV: ~$33.7M (1.41B × $0.0234). Small cap, mature project with focus on value accrual vs growth metrics.

unlocks.major_unlock_events: Foundation & Ecosystem allocations released July-October 2025 (~6.3M OGN, 650K OGN). Team vesting 4yr schedule complete for most. No major unlocks anticipated post-2025.
unlocks.notes: Unlocked tokens do NOT automatically circulate—many stakeholders voluntarily lock tokens as xOGN to earn buyback yield. Effective circulating supply stable despite unlock events.

mechanism.multiplier_model: time-weighted: longer locks earn higher xOGN multiplier (up to 1x for 1-year lock)
mechanism.early_exit_mechanism: unstake fee based on remaining lock time
mechanism.voting_rights: xOGN holders vote on governance proposals, parameter settings, revenue allocation
mechanism.revenue_capture: 100% of protocol revenue flows to xOGN holders via OGN buybacks (approved June 2025)
mechanism.notes: Vote-escrow model creates alignment between governance power & economic stake. No new token emissions—all yield funded by protocol revenue buybacks. Rewards accrue continuously, claimable without unlocking position.

buyback_history.notes: 100% protocol revenue (OETH, OUSD, Super OETH, OS, ARM) → OGN buybacks. $480K+ bought back June 30-Aug 4, 2025 (from both revenue + DAO treasury). On pace for ~90M OGN buybacks in 2026 alone—nearly doubling all prior years combined.

inflation.burn_notes: No dedicated burn. Bought OGN distributed to xOGN stakers, reducing supply pressure via holder concentration rather than destruction.

main_products.name: OETH
main_products.nov_2025_update: eliminated third-party oracle reliance for validator balance verification

main_products.name: ARM
main_products.function: seamless LST ↔ ETH swaps with zero slippage

product_ecosystem.multichain_expansion: Base blockchain (Morpho markets integration for OETH/OUSD)

data_collection_notes: Gathered from Origin Protocol official site, governance forums, and token holder updates (Apr-Nov 2025 period). Supply: 1.41B max, 660M circulating (~47%). Market: ~$15.8M cap at $0.0234. xOGN vote-escrow model with ~40% staking APY from buyback revenue. Buyback program (100% revenue allocation since June 2025) has repurchased 83M OGN (12.5% of supply) to date, with 23M+ bought in 2026 YTD. No new emissions, minimal remaining unlock pressure. Mature project pivoted from NFT → LST aggregator/yield platform. Deflationary via buyback-funded staking yield, not token destruction.
